blocks.content: Since Dante and his crew took 1st to 3rd place, the rankings of all members of the class were pushed down.
Of course, the rankings remained unchanged.
After the midterms, the students stopped talking about Shirone.
Without any feedback or reaction, spreading gossip became pointless.
Pandora, feeling desperate, had been trying hard to blend in with Dante's group, but there remained an invisible barrier between her and them.
Pandora, who thought that this couldn't go on, pretended to massage Savina's shoulder and spoke quietly.

blocks.speaker: Pandora
blocks.content: Hey, Savina. I want to get better at combat too. Do you have any tips?

blocks.speaker: Savina
blocks.content: Combat? Well, you do use magic by the book. Stop doing that and learn some passive skills. It'll make things a lot easier. It's not like learning them first will mess you up. Seriously, this academy is strange.
Although Savina offered advice, it was clear she didn't want to put in any extra effort.

blocks.speaker: Pandora
blocks.content: No, how about teaching me in Heaven's Trial?

blocks.speaker: Savina
blocks.content: Huh? Are you challenging me now?

blocks.speaker: Pandora
blocks.content: No, no! Not at all. I just thought it would be good to learn some passive skills or tactics that could be useful in combat.
Closer's gaze drifted to Pandora's chest. He had been waiting for an opportunity, and with Pandora now came out like this, it made things easier for him.

blocks.speaker: Closer
blocks.content: Yeah, after all, Pandora is part of our group, so it wouldn't hurt for her to become stronger. So, how about we give you some special tutoring?

blocks.speaker: Pandora
blocks.content: Oh my, really? If you did that, I would be so grateful!
Dante's group, having found a spot in the corner of the training ground, had Pandora stand up while they each offered her some advice.
As is often the case with advice from others, it was just the same old information dressed up in impressive language.

blocks.speaker: Closer
blocks.content: Alright, the three of us will attack you from all sides, so try to counter it with your scent magic. Don't worry, we'll take it slow.

blocks.speaker: Pandora
blocks.content: Huh? Oh. Okay.
Dante's group began to apply pressure on Pandora with basic magic.
From the perspective of the person receiving it, it was a useful class in its own way, but from the perspective of onlookers, it seemed like training a dog.

blocks.speaker: Savina
blocks.content: Haha! You're doing pretty well. But don't just run away, fight back. We're getting bored.
Pandora followed her words and cast Olif's Flower scent, which causes mental confusion.
While not immediately effective, it was often used in real combat due to its ability to catch opponents off guard.
And Savina fell right into that scheme.
Pandora, who thought she could caught her off, spread her signature scent, Fire Flower (created by Alones).
그리고 사비나는 그 작전에 정확히 걸려들었다.
잡을 수 있다고 생각한 판도라가 회심의 향기인 파이어 플라워(제조사 알로네스)를 퍼트렸다.
With her senses dulled by the Olif scent, Savina couldn't help but inhale a small amount of the Fire Flower.
A burning sensation quickly spread through her lungs as if she had inhaled flames.
If the synchronization rate wasn't at 50%, it would have been dangerous.

blocks.speaker: Savina
blocks.content: Cough! Cough!

blocks.speaker: Pandora
blocks.content: Savina! Are you okay?
Pandora, who had been rushing over in concern, suddenly felt a chill and stopped in her tracks.
Savina, who had been hanging her head, looked up with cold eyes.

blocks.speaker: Savina
blocks.content: S- Sorry.

blocks.speaker: Pandora
blocks.content: It's fine. You did really well. This is how you improve.
Savina's face broke into a fake smile as if nothing had happened.
She couldn't show any sign of weakness, especially not in front of other students, particularly those younger than her.

blocks.speaker: Pandora
blocks.content: Um... I think that's enough for today. I've learned a lot.

blocks.speaker: Savina
blocks.content: What are you talking about? You've just started to grow. Now, let's get serious with the training!
Before she could finish speaking, Dante and Closer charged at her.
Furious at Pandora for daring to strike back, they no longer held back.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Now, Pandora! Take this too!

blocks.speaker: Closer
blocks.content: Hohoho! Here comes more!
With all three attacking her seriously, Pandora had no way to defend herself.
In the end, a near-fatal anti-magic shook her Spirit Zone, and she collapsed to the ground.
Dante's crew didn't stop. They mercilessly poured magic onto her, adjusting their power so that her gauge would drain as slowly as possible.
Watching the scene, some of the other students spoke up in concern.

blocks.speaker: Student
blocks.content: Hey, isn't that too much?

blocks.speaker: Student
blocks.content: This isn't teaching; it's just a beating.
Pandora, resigned, lowered her head and accepted the barrage of magic.
She felt so humiliated that she couldn't even bring herself to ask them to stop.
Seeing his rival being humiliated like that, Boyle clenched his fists.
Pandora had always been a difficult person, but she had worked her way up from Class Ten to where she was now.
He couldn't understand what she had done to deserve such mistreatment.
Pandora's mental strength was depleted, causing her bracelet to light up.
With no more magic to unleash, Savina stopped her attacks and looked down at Pandora with a sneer.

blocks.speaker: Savina
blocks.content: How was that? Did it help at all?
Pandora's tear-filled eyes spoke volumes of the torment she had just endured.
She didn't need anyone to tell her what had happened.

blocks.speaker: Pandora
blocks.content: Yeah. I learned a lot. Thanks.

blocks.speaker: Savina
blocks.content: Puhahahahaha!

blocks.speaker: Closer
blocks.content: Yeah. I guess I've been too weak. Please help me again next time.
Savina still felt uneasy. She had to at least convey the humiliation she had suffered at the hands of Fire Flower.

blocks.speaker: Savina
blocks.content: Getting beaten like this over and over is how you get stronger. Got it?

blocks.speaker: Pandora
blocks.content: Yeah. I guess I've been too weak. Please help me again next time.

blocks.speaker: Savina
blocks.content: Really? Then kneel down quickly.
Pandora looked up in despair.
But Savina's eyes were cold and unyielding.

blocks.speaker: Savina
blocks.content: What are you waiting for? You lost, so kneel and beg. Or have you already forgotten the rules?
Pandora tried to hold back, but she couldn't stop the tears from bursting out.
Her shoulders trembled as she began to cry.

blocks.speaker: Closer
blocks.content: Hahaha! Are you crying now? Are you that upset? You really are something, trying to act tough when you're so weak. Hey, everyone, look here! Your senior is bawling her eyes out!
The younger students turned away, embarrassed.
If they were in that situation, it would be terrifying to even imagine.
The teachers also recognized the seriousness of the situation.
Thad, in particular, wasn't planning to let this slide and started walking toward them.
They had to listen to their story, but they could not avoid disciplinary action.
Savina, noticing Thad, realized she had crossed a line.
It seemed she had let herself get too worked up over being bested by a country bumpkin.
But she couldn't show herself trembling.

blocks.speaker: Savina
blocks.content: What, can't bring yourself to kneel? Then just get lost. And don't ever look me in the eye again.

blocks.speaker: Pandora
blocks.content: No, no.
Pandora shook her head.
Her action was instinctive.
If they could just understand her feelings, what difference did it make to kneel now?

blocks.speaker: Pandora
blocks.content: I lost. So…
Just as Pandora began to kneel, someone grabbed her arm.
Thad stopped in his tracks, and Boyle's eyes widened in surprise.

blocks.speaker: Boyle
blocks.content: Shirone? Why…?
Pandora turned her head, puzzled to see that it was Shirone who had come to her aid.
He had never intervened in anything related to Dante until now.
Shirone passed Pandora and approached Dante.
The silence that followed was longer than expected, but no one found it drawn out.
This was the first clash, and it had taken three months to reach this point.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Why are you doing this?

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Doing what? What exactly have we done? All we did was practice some one-on-one combat.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You attacked Pandora, three against one. And she had already lost the will to fight.

blocks.speaker: Savina
blocks.content: Oh my! Did you have a crush on Pandora? This is hilarious! You might as well confess your feelings while you're at it...

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I wasn't talking to you. I'm talking to Dante, so stay out of it.
Savina's face turned red at Shirone's word, but Dante didn't care.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Fine, I'll admit we went a bit too far. But Pandora asked us to teach her, and we agreed. That's all there is to it. If you want the details, ask Pandora. That's all.
As Dante turned to leave, Pandora hung her head, feeling despondent.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Stop talking nonsense. Who do you think you are, claiming you have the skill to teach anyone?

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: What... did you just say?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Don't kid yourself. Just because you've beaten a few classmates doesn't mean you're the best. You don't understand what one-on-one combat really is unless you've fought against everyone.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Haha! I was wondering what you were saying. That's why we have rankings and records. I've never lost, and I already took down the top of the advanced class here. Isn't that enough?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Are you that confident? Then why don't you take me on?
The students looked back with shocked faces.
This was the first time that Shirone, who had been as immobile as a stone, had thrown down his gloves.
Dante's complexion was not calm either.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Why should I?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Think about it. You're the one who has avoided every challenge so far. And now, all of a sudden, you want to face me? I'm not someone who fights when I want and runs when I don't.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: I don't want to fight someone who doesn't want to fight. But I do want you to promise that you'll stop bullying my friends.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: When have I ever bullied anyone? They're all bowing down to me on their own. If you didn't like it, you should have stopped me from the start. It's not fair to whine about it now after missing your chance.
In any case, Dante, who had received Olivia's special mission, had to crush Shirone.
After some thought, he came up with a way to both protect his pride and crush Shirone.
